next_steps: Assess for immediate safety including suicide and infanticide risk
Referral to specialized reproductive psychiatry services
Initiate or optimize evidence-based pharmacotherapy for OCD (e.g., higher-dose SSRI)
Consider adjunctive therapy such as Exposure and Response Prevention (ERP)
Implement psychoeducation for patient and family regarding intrusive thoughts
Regular monitoring of blood pressure and postpartum physical health
Frequent follow-up visits to ensure adherence and safety
